creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kai Knoblich from comment #1)

Thanks!

I tried to change my address at Bugzilla, but unfortunately once I had done it I was unable to login successfully and had to revert the change. I asked on the #freebsd-bugs IRC channel about that and was explained that I could not use my @FreeBSD.org address because it is only an email alias instead of a full account.
